summary: A compact two-story residential structure with a stepped gable roof. The building features brick and stone walls with horizontal banding, a white concrete foundation, and dark windows. The roof is constructed with dark wood or nether brick in a distinctive stepped pyramid pattern. The structure sits on a raised platform with a white perimeter border.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped gable roof

elements: windows (dark, rectangular, centered on each visible face)
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular base 10x10 blocks, 2 stories tall (8 blocks interior height)
Use brick for primary walls with horizontal stonebrick banding at mid-height and top
Create stepped gable roof using nether_brick or dark wood in pyramid pattern (5-6 steps)
Place centered rectangular windows on all four sides, approximately 4 blocks wide x 3 blocks tall
Surround base with white concrete platform, 1 block high, extending 1-2 blocks outward
Add concrete border/trim around foundation perimeter
Ensure bilateral symmetry across all axes
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and room configuration not visible
Precise window frame material (appears white but could be concrete, quartz, or other light block)
Whether roof is nether_brick or dark wood planks
Exact height of interior floors (estimated 4 blocks per story)
Presence of doors or other openings not visible from these angles
Interior wall materials and decorations unknown
